name: Mom's Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, white vinegar, catsup, paprika, and crushed garlic.
2. Place the brisket (4-10 lbs) in an oven cooking bag and cover with the pepper mixture.
3. Pour the marinade over the brisket, ensuring it is fully coated.
4. Refrigerate overnight to allow the flavors to infuse.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
6. Cook the brisket in the baking bag for 3-4 hours.
